name: Neal Sheorey
background: Mr. Sheorey has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since November 2023. Prior to joining Albemarle, he served as Vice President, Finance for Dow Inc.'s Coatings & Performance Monomers and Plastic Additives businesses.
